ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "imdbId" TEXT /* IMDB identifier for the film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the film */,
  "original_language" TEXT /* Original language of the film */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average vote score the film has received */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Total number of votes the film has received */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget for the film */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Total revenue generated by the film */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "genres_id" TEXT /* Identifiers for genres associated with the film */,
  "countries_id" TEXT /* Identifiers for countries associated with the film */,
  "companies_id" TEXT /* Identifiers for production companies involved with the film */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the film's release */,
  "test" TEXT /* Test status or annotation */,
  "binary" TEXT /* Binary status or annotation */,
  "directors_id" INTEGER /* Identifiers for the director of the film */,
  "writers_id" TEXT /* Identifiers for the writer of the film */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline for the film */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview or summary of the film */,
  "poster_path" TEXT /* Path to the film's poster image */,
  "backdrop_path" TEXT /* Path to the film's backdrop image */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the film (released, upcoming, etc.) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the film was created in the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the film's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_directors_id FOREIGN KEY ("directors_id") REFERENCES directors ("directors_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_genres_id FOREIGN KEY ("genres_id") REFERENCES genres ("genres_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_companies_id FOREIGN KEY ("companies_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("companies_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_countries_id FOREIGN KEY ("countries_id") REFERENCES countries ("countries_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_writers_id FOREIGN KEY ("writers_id") REFERENCES writers ("writers_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genres_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the genre was created in the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the genre's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genres_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "countries_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country is located in */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the country was created in the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the country's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("countries_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "companies_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the production company */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the company was created in the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the company's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("companies_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "directors_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the director was created in the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the director's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("directors_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writers_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the writer */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the writer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the writer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the writer */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the writer was created in the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the writer's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writers_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "users_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, moderator, user) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created in the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("users_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "users_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who made the interaction */,
  "films_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the film associated with the interaction */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user to the film */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the user for the film */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "films_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the film associated with the version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "films_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the film associated with the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_rating" REAL /* Rating given in the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "films_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the film associated with the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "films_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the film associated with the cast member */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id")
)
